visual_description: The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical drone, creating a feeling of unease and anticipation. A medium close-up shot shows two men in a dimly lit, green-hued environment. The man on the right, with dark, disheveled hair, looks toward the camera with a slight, knowing smile. He wears a dark jacket over a black shirt. To his left, another man in a blue patterned shirt is bent over, focused on eating from a bowl with chopsticks. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The background is dark and out of focus. The man on the right brings a piece of food to his mouth and chews, his expression shifting to one of contemplation. The camera remains steady, maintaining its focus on the two men. A sharp, percussive sound, like a quick, metallic click, cuts through the tension. The scene cuts to a wide shot of a dark, outdoor setting at night. A large, dense bush dominates the right side of the frame. In the distance, the bright, glaring headlights of a vehicle approach, creating a significant lens flare that washes out part of the image. A streetlamp is visible on the left. The same white Chinese characters remain
